_README: Conservative testnet config for the first multi-day continuous run.
All sizing caps are intentionally tiny — this run is about EXECUTION
correctness (reconcile, fills, buckets, cOID, ledger) not P&L.
Promote any of these knobs only AFTER 48-72h with zero divergence
between local bucket state and exchange-reported positions, AND zero
duplicate-market-overlay events. See README / docs for upgrade path.
_operational: - unfilledtimeout_entry_seconds: kill any pending entry > 10 min old.
- unfilledtimeout_exit_seconds: kill any pending exit > 30 min old.
- max_orders_per_batch: 5 = throttle reconcile bursts vs rate limits.

grid._comment: Tiny WE: a stuck grid eats <= 10% of balance.

trend._comment: Slightly loose strong threshold so signals fire on testnet.

merger._comment: Trend overlay budget kept small: 0.5% notional per entry.

regime._comment: Continuous overlay scaling, not the legacy hard gate.

risk._comment: Tight HSL thresholds and realized-loss gate for first run.

correlation_gate._comment: Single-symbol config — gate is effectively idle for now.
